plugins.name: spec-core
plugins.description: Shared base conventions for the spec plugins (cross-plugin naming and layout)

plugins.name: wiki-scaffold
plugins.description: Bootstrap an LLM-maintained knowledge base via a prism-driven interview, then scaffold its schema and operating skills

plugins.name: project-scaffold
plugins.description: Scaffold a microservice repo from scratch and initialize all spec layers

plugins.name: model-diagrams
plugins.description: Scaffold, review, and annotate Mermaid class diagrams that feed the spec plugins

plugins.name: domain-spec
plugins.description: Generate specs for domain packages and implement them

plugins.name: persistence-spec
plugins.description: Generate specs for repositories and implement them

plugins.name: application-spec
plugins.description: Generate specs for application services and implement them

plugins.name: rest-api-spec
plugins.description: Generate specs for REST API endpoints and implement them

plugins.name: messaging-spec
plugins.description: Generate specs for messaging and implement them
